---
name: AI Feedback
about: Share feedback about MOSO AI's behavior, responses, or intelligence
title: '[AI] '
labels: ai-feedback
assignees: ''
---

## Feedback Type
- [ ] Response Quality
- [ ] Personality / Tone
- [ ] Memory Accuracy
- [ ] Understanding / Comprehension
- [ ] Speed / Performance
- [ ] Voice / Interaction
- [ ] Recommendation Quality
- [ ] Other

## Description
Describe the interaction or behavior you're providing feedback about.

## What Worked Well
What did MOSO do well in this interaction?

## What Could Be Improved
What didn't work well or could be better?

## Context
What were you trying to do or ask?

## Expected vs Actual
What did you expect and what actually happened?

## Privacy Check
- [ ] This feedback contains NO personal or sensitive data
- [ ] I understand this feedback will be used to improve MOSO AI

## Additional Notes
Any additional context, screenshots, or logs (sanitized).
